---
title: ".FUN"
---

## AFK

### Soccer

```{=html}
<div class="container">
  <div class="row align-items-center">
    <div class="col-md-7">
      <ul>
        <li>4-year Varsity Letter winner at University of Wisconsin – Madison</li>
        <li>Athletic Scholarship Recipient</li>
        <li>Won Big Ten Conference Title (2019)</li>
        <li>Contributed to team appearances in NCAA Sweet 16 (2018, 2019)</li>
        <li>One of two Wisconsin student athletes chosen for the Big Ten COVID-19 'Return to Play' Taskforce</li>
      </ul>
    </div>
    <div class="col-md-5">
      <img src="images/trophy.jpeg" class="img-fluid rounded" alt="Trophy">
    </div>
  </div>
</div>
```

## Hobbies

::: row
::: {.col-md-4 .img-container}
![On the search for the best oat cappucino..](images/selfie-coffee.png){.img-fluid .rounded}
:::

::: {.col-md-4 .img-container}
![Getting out of the city!](images/hike-em.jpeg){.img-fluid .rounded}
:::

::: {.col-md-4 .img-container}
![Dipping back into the fiddle](images/violin.jpeg){.img-fluid .rounded}
:::
:::
